title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.485 - Deputy Sheriff Aaron P Roberts Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway H in Greene County
text:
227.485.  Deputy Sheriff Aaron P Roberts Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway H in Greene County. — The portion of State Highway H from Interstate 44 West continuing north to County Road 88 in Greene County shall be designated as "Deputy Sheriff Aaron P Roberts Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 520)
